official_debut.notable_event: Was sent off less than two minutes after coming on following an incident with Vilmos Vanczák.

playing_roles.description: Began his international career playing from the right wing, using pace and dribbling to attack defenders.
Played close to the centre-forward, linking midfield and attack while creating and scoring goals.
Frequently operated without a traditional striker, dropping deep to create space and dictate attacks.
Often led Argentina's attack while combining with Ángel Di María, Gonzalo Higuaín and Sergio Agüero.
Dropped deeper into midfield, orchestrating Argentina's attacks through passing, vision and intelligent movement.
Became Argentina's primary creative force, controlling possession, creating chances and setting the team's attacking rhythm.

legacy.status: Greatest player in Argentina national team history
considered: Greatest international player of all time
One of the greatest footballers of all time
legacy.description: Messi transformed Argentina into one of the most successful national teams of the modern era. After years of near misses, he captained Argentina to victory in the 2021 Copa América, the 2022 Finalissima, the 2022 FIFA World Cup and the 2024 Copa América. He became Argentina's all-time leading appearance maker, top goalscorer and assist provider while breaking numerous FIFA and CONMEBOL records. His international career is widely regarded as one of the greatest in football history.

major_events: Made his FIFA youth tournament debut.
Finished as the tournament's top scorer with six goals.
Won both the Golden Ball and Golden Boot.
Led Argentina to its fifth FIFA U-20 World Cup title.
Established himself as one of the world's brightest young talents.

matches.description: Scored both goals from the penalty spot to secure Argentina's fifth FIFA U-20 World Cup title.

iconic_matches.description: Produced a match-winning performance by scoring both goals in the final, earning the Golden Ball and Golden Boot.
Scored against Argentina's biggest rivals to send his team into the final.
